# The London Choral Service

> Professional singers, choirs, and instrumentalists for funerals, weddings, memorials, and ceremonies across the United Kingdom. Over 150 conservatoire-trained musicians based in London.

The London Choral Service provides live music for life's most important occasions. Founded and led by Artistic Director Luca Wetherall (Tutor in Music, University of Oxford), the ensemble comprises prize-winning graduates of the Royal Academy of Music, the Royal College of Music, and Britain's leading music colleges. Their credits include the coronation of King Charles III, the Royal Albert Hall, Westminster Abbey, and the BBC Proms. The service is the operating name of Alma Consort Ltd.

## Main Pages

- [Services](https://londonchoralservice.com/services.html): Ensemble options from solo singers to full choirs, plus instrumentalists — for funerals, weddings, memorials, and ceremonies
- [Pricing](https://londonchoralservice.com/pricing.html): Transparent pricing for all ensemble sizes, from solo voice (£250) to full choir (£2,295)
- [About Our Musicians](https://londonchoralservice.com/about.html): Founded by Luca Wetherall, with musicians from the Royal Academy of Music, Royal College of Music, and Guildhall
- [Contact](https://londonchoralservice.com/contact.html): Enquiry form and direct contact — email office@londonchoralservice.com or call 07356 042468

## Music Guides

- [How to Choose Music for a Funeral](https://londonchoralservice.com/music-guides/funeral-music-guide.html): Step-by-step guide to selecting hymns, solo pieces, and instrumental music for a funeral service
- [The Most Popular Funeral Hymns](https://londonchoralservice.com/music-guides/popular-funeral-hymns.html): The hymns families choose most often, from Abide with Me to The Lord's My Shepherd, with notes on each
- [Choosing Hymns for Your Wedding](https://londonchoralservice.com/music-guides/choosing-wedding-hymns.html): How to pick wedding hymns your guests will actually sing, with suggestions for every style
- [Music for a Celebration of Life](https://londonchoralservice.com/music-guides/celebration-of-life-music.html): How celebration of life music differs from a traditional funeral, with popular choices and planning advice
- [What to Expect When You Hire a Choir](https://londonchoralservice.com/music-guides/hiring-a-choir.html): The complete process from first enquiry to the day, including costs and what to ask
- [The Most Popular Funeral Songs](https://londonchoralservice.com/music-guides/funeral-songs.html): Popular non-hymn funeral songs from Time to Say Goodbye to My Way, with advice on live vs recorded
- [Choosing Music for a Crematorium Service](https://londonchoralservice.com/music-guides/crematorium-music.html): Practical guide to music at crematorium funerals — timing, acoustics, and making a shorter service meaningful
- [How Much Does Funeral Music Cost?](https://londonchoralservice.com/music-guides/funeral-music-costs.html): Clear breakdown of funeral musician costs in 2026, from soloists to full choirs

## Areas We Serve

- [Areas We Serve](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/): All locations where we provide funeral singers, wedding choirs, and ceremony musicians
- [London](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/london.html): Funeral singers and wedding choirs across all London boroughs
- [Birmingham](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/birmingham.html): Musicians for funerals and weddings in Birmingham and the West Midlands
- [Manchester](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/manchester.html): Choirs and singers across Manchester and Greater Manchester
- [Liverpool](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/liverpool.html): Funeral and wedding musicians for Liverpool and Merseyside
- [Oxford](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/oxford.html): Funeral singers and wedding choirs in Oxford and Oxfordshire
- [Cambridge](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/cambridge.html): Ceremony musicians for Cambridge and Cambridgeshire
- [Reading](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/reading.html): Musicians for funerals and weddings in Reading and Berkshire
- [Slough & Maidenhead](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/slough-maidenhead.html): Singers and choirs in Slough, Maidenhead, and eastern Berkshire
- [Guildford](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/guildford.html): Funeral and wedding music across Guildford and Surrey
- [Brighton](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/brighton.html): Singers and choirs in Brighton & Hove and East Sussex
- [Chester](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/chester.html): Musicians for occasions in Chester and Cheshire
- [St Albans](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/st-albans.html): Funeral and wedding musicians in St Albans and Hertfordshire
- [Canterbury](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/canterbury.html): Ceremony musicians for Canterbury and Kent
- [Windsor](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/windsor.html): Musicians for the Royal Borough of Windsor
- [Winchester](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/winchester.html): Funeral and wedding music in Winchester and Hampshire
- [Salisbury](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/salisbury.html): Singers and choirs in Salisbury and Wiltshire
- [Bath](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/bath.html): Musicians for occasions in Bath, Bristol, and Somerset
- [Chelmsford](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/chelmsford.html): Funeral and wedding musicians in Chelmsford and Essex
- [Rochester](https://londonchoralservice.com/areas/rochester.html): Singers and choirs for Rochester, Medway, and north Kent
